name: TestFlight & Play Submit
description: Runs local EAS builds for Expo apps and submits artifacts non-interactively to TestFlight (iOS) or Google Play (Android), with profile-aware build numbers, eas.json pre-flight checks, and separate build-then-submit steps.
howToUse: Invoke with `/testflight`, or `/testflight ios` / `/testflight android` for one platform; add a profile as a second argument (e.g. `int`, `uat`, `prod`; defaults to `prod`). Before use, ensure `eas.json` has `submit.<profile>.ios.ascAppId` and `submit.<profile>.android.serviceAccountKeyPath` as required. The assistant runs `eas` CLI commands on your behalf—do not run them yourself.
author: Sean Hise
